programme.title: The Magic of Ordinary Days
programme.desc: Pregnant out of wedlock, an educated young woman is pressured by her father into an arranged marriage with a lonely farmer in this drama set during WWII. Stars Keri Russell and Skeet Ulrich.

programme.title: One Summer
programme.desc: Jack takes his son and daughter to his late wife's beachside hometown hoping to heal and become closer. The summer brings visions of the past that could forge a new path forward. Stars Sam Page, Sarah Drew and Amanda Schull.

programme.title: Pearl in Paradise
programme.desc: Alex, a photographer for a travel magazine, and Colin, a best-selling author, team up to find an elusive Fijian pearl.

programme.title: Mystery 101: Pilot
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, English professor Amy uses her crime fiction expertise to unravel the case faster than detective Travis, who ends up working with Amy to catch the killer. Stars Jill Wagner, Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: A Summer Romance
programme.desc: Samantha's Montana ranch is her family's legacy, so when a developer shows up to buy it, Sam isn't interested. But as he tries to win her trust and her ranch, Sam finds he might also be winning her heart. Erin Krakow, Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: The Nine Lives of Christmas
programme.desc: Zachary Stone, a handsome bachelor with distaste for responsibility, sees his life change before his eyes when he decides to adopt a stray cat.

programme.title: Valentine in the Vineyard
programme.desc: Back for the third installment, Frankie and Nate manage life on the vineyard and plan a wedding in secret! Stars Rachael Leigh Cook and Brendan Penny.

programme.title: Love to the Rescue
programme.desc: Two single parents come head to head when their kids want to adopt the same dog. Agreeing to co-foster, free-spirited Kate and type-A Eric must work together to find the dog's forever home. Starring Nikki DeLoach and Michael Rady.

programme.title: Color My World with Love
programme.desc: Emma's daughter Kendall becomes engaged, but Emma is concerned as Kendall and her fiancé have Down Syndrome and Emma worries she's not ready to take this step. Stars Lily D. Moore, Erica Durance, Benjamin Ayres, David DeSanctis.

programme.title: Love and Sunshine
programme.desc: Ally Craig has been fostering retired military dog, Sunshine, as she recovers from a broken engagement. But sparks fly again when Sunshine's military partner, Jake Terry, returns to claim the dog. Danica McKellar, Mark Deklin.

programme.title: A Country Wedding
programme.desc: A country western star returns to his hometown to sell his childhood home prior to his wedding. Upon his arrival, he meets the girl he proposed to when he was 8-years-old and she helps plan the wedding in his fiances absence.

programme.title: October Kiss
programme.desc: A free-spirited young woman is hired by a career-driven single dad as a temporary nanny for his two young children. As Halloween approaches she finds herself also becoming drawn to their dad. Stars Ashley Williams and Sam Jaeger.

programme.title: A Dash of Love
programme.desc: When an aspiring chef lands an assistant job at her idol's restaurant, she's convinced her big break is just around the corner. After a rocky start, she befriends the handsome executive chef and they begin bonding in the kitchen.

programme.title: Winter in Vail
programme.desc: Chelsea inherits a house in Vail. She meets Owen and gets a much needed break. Together, they put on Strudelfest to highlight the charm of Old Vail. Lacey Chabert, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: Taking a Shot at Love
programme.desc: Jenna, a former professional dancer, uses ballet to help a hockey player get back on the ice. Stars Alexa PenaVega and Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: It Was Always You
programme.desc: Elizabeth's engagement plans are thrown into disarray when her fiancé's free-spirited brother David returns home. David's unexpected influence prompts Elizabeth to question her life decisions. Stars Erin Krakow, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: Bridal Wave
programme.desc: A soon-to-be bride is planning her dream wedding to a well-off doctor at a beautiful resort. Although his family doesn't care much for her, she's trying to make the most of the situation.

programme.title: Bottled with Love
programme.desc: After being stood up, Abbey gets inspired to open her heart in a letter, put it in a bottle and toss it out to sea. Months later, a man fishing discovers it and opts to reach out. Stars Bethany Joy Lenz, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: A Biltmore Christmas
programme.desc: Screenwriter Lucy Hardgrove lands the job of a lifetime when she is hired to remake the beloved holiday movie "His Merry Wife!" Bethany Joy Lenz, Kristoffer Polaha, Jonathan Frakes.

programme.title: O Brave New World
programme.desc: Rebecca and her young daughter, Sarah, travel west to start a new life. They meet rugged rancher, Tom, and discover the boardinghouse Rebecca purchased is not as promised. Stars Bethany Joy Lenz, Benjamin Ayres, Jill Hennessy.

programme.title: Love on the Slopes
programme.desc: NYC-based editor, Alex, is sent to an extreme sports outpost, to write a story. At first, she fails at everything, much to the chagrin of Cole, an extreme sports enthusiast who thinks this city girl should head back to New York.

programme.title: The Story of Us
programme.desc: Jamie learns that her first love Sawyer is the architect of a development that wants to change her beloved neighborhood and threatens her bookstore. Can old Valentines help them see eye to eye? Starring Maggie Lawson and Sam Page.

programme.title: Love on the Danube: Love Song
programme.desc: Fellow cruise passengers, Sarah and Jack, play matchmaker with their music loving widowed parents, as they cruise down the Danube visiting European cities. Stars Nazneen Contractor, Wes Brown, Kathryn Drysdale, Catherine Disher.

programme.title: Royal Matchmaker
programme.desc: A NYC matchmaker is hired by a king to find his son a suitable wife in time for a celebration. As the clock ticks towards the deadline, he finds him the perfect wife, only to realize that she's fallen in love with him.

programme.title: Bridal Wave
programme.desc: A soon-to-be bride is planning her dream wedding to a well-off doctor at a beautiful resort. Although his family doesn't care much for her, she's trying to make the most of the situation.

programme.title: Roadhouse Romance
programme.desc: Country music fan Callie is determined to continue her late grandfather's legacy. While TV director Luke is in town, he teaches her that sometimes it's best to look forward instead of back. Stars Lauren Alaina and Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: October Kiss
programme.desc: A free-spirited young woman is hired by a career-driven single dad as a temporary nanny for his two young children. As Halloween approaches she finds herself also becoming drawn to their dad. Stars Ashley Williams and Sam Jaeger.

programme.title: Haunted Wedding
programme.desc: Jana and Brian's plan to wed is in jeopardy when Angelique, a ghost in an 18th century wedding dress, vows to stop it. The couple must work together to save their wedding from disaster. Stars Janel Parrish, Dominic Sherwood.

programme.title: A Valentine's Match
programme.desc: Fired from her job as a reality TV host, Natalie returns home for Valentine's Day, only to find herself running the town festival's auction with her ex-fiance thanks to two scheming mothers. Bethany Joy Lenz, Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: Because of Cupid
programme.desc: Best friends Naomi and Marcus participate in a Valentine's Day mocktail competition but things go awry when Cupid interferes with a love potion that affects Marcus and several of their friends. Stars Amy Groening, Evan Roderick.

programme.title: The Heiress and the Handyman
programme.desc: After losing her fortune, an heiress moves to a rural farm where she mistakes her handsome neighbor for the handyman. To live up to her family's legacy, he helps her compete at the county fair. Stars Jodie Sweetin, Corey Sevier.

programme.title: Autumn at Apple Hill
programme.desc: Elise is trying to keep her family inn afloat when the CFO of a major hotel chain checks in as a guest. Is he there to enjoy the fall season or try to take over her beloved inn? Stars Erin Cahill, Wes Brown.

programme.title: Sweet Autumn
programme.desc: Aunt Dee splits her candy shop between her niece, Maggie, and maple farmer, Dex. Following letters Dee left, the two uncover the reason for her decision, during the Sweet Autumn festival. Stars Nikki DeLoach & Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Love on the Sidelines
programme.desc: A romantic comedy about a down-on-her-luck young woman who falls into a job as a personal assistant to a star quarterback. He's never had a female assistant before and she knows nothing about football.

programme.title: Moonlight in Vermont
programme.desc: When Fiona gets dumped she heads for a week in Vermont at her Dad's country Inn. There she runs into her ex with his new girlfriend. She strikes a deal with the Inn's chef, Derek, to be her "boyfriend" for the week.

programme.title: Branching Out
programme.desc: To help build a family tree, single mom Amelia tracks down her daughter's biological father. It becomes a journey of trust, love, and discovering the meaning of family. Stars Sarah Drew, Juan Pablo Di Pace.

programme.title: My Argentine Heart
programme.desc: Abril goes to Argentina to save her family ranch from being bought by her ex. But when outside forces threaten the ranch the pair must come together, rekindling their love in the process. Stars Julie Gonzalo, Juan Pablo Di Pace.

programme.title: The Secret Ingredient
programme.desc: Small-town baker, Kelly, gets a big surprise when she is invited to compete on a Valentine's Day baking show in New York City - and an even bigger surprise when she runs into her ex-fiance. Stars Erin Cahill, Brendan Penny.

programme.title: Savoring Paris
programme.desc: Disillusioned with her life, Ella embarks on a soul-searching journey to Paris where she navigates love, self-discovery and cheese amidst the enchanting backdrop of The City of Love. Stars Bethany Joy Lenz and Stanley Weber.

programme.title: A Machu Picchu Proposal
programme.desc: Katie helps plan her brother's proposal atop Machu Picchu. When the proposal is ruined by spontaneous Chef Carlos, Katie enlists Carlos to help her find the most romantic spot in all of Peru. Stars Rhiannon Fish and Alec Santos.

programme.title: Three Wiser Men and a Boy (Extended Cut)
programme.desc: The Brenner brothers are back and putting on a holiday pageant for young Thomas while trying to cope with life's curveballs, including their mom's new boyfriend. Stars Paul Campbell, Tyler Hynes, Andrew Walker, Margaret Colin.

programme.title: Three Wisest Men (Extended Cut)
programme.desc: As life pushes the family in different directions, the Brenner boys decide they need to put on the Best Christmas Ever to bring everyone back together. (Paul Campbell, Tyler Hynes, Andrew Walker, Margaret Colin)

programme.title: Christmas by Starlight
programme.desc: When her family's beloved eatery, The Starlight Café, is slated for demolition, Annie vows to put a stop to it before Christmas. Stars Paul Campbell and Kimberley Sustad.

programme.title: The Santa Class
programme.desc: Kate North, the owner of a struggling Santa School, and her instructor, Dan, must help an amnesia-stricken Santa Claus regain his memories to save Christmas and hopefully her school as well. Stars Kimberley Sustad, Benjamin Ayres.

programme.title: Merry Christmas, Ted Cooper!
programme.desc: An unlucky weatherman, Ted, continues to see the glass half full. He's determined to share his Christmas cheer with his high school crush, Hope, when they reconnect. Starring Robert Buckley and Kimberley Sustad.

programme.title: 'Twas the Date Before Christmas
programme.desc: Feeling the pressure to bring someone home for Christmas, Jessie convinces Bryan to join her family for a day filled with holiday events, only the family doesn't know it's their first date. Stars Robert Buckley, Amy Groening.

programme.title: An Unexpected Christmas
programme.desc: A speech writer makes a deal with his ex-girlfriend to pretend they're a couple to save his family's Christmas. It's not long before both the ruse and their feelings catch up with them. Stars Bethany Joy Lenz, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: Christmas Above the Clouds
programme.desc: Eager to avoid Christmas, Ella Neezer, a CEO, books an international trip that skips the holiday, until three spirits journey Ella through her life to rediscover her Christmas spirit. Erin Krakow, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: Next Stop, Christmas
programme.desc: Angie is determined to spend Christmas alone but her usual commuter ride turns into a Christmas train that drops her off in her home town in 2011. Stars Lyndsy Fonseca, Chandler Massey, Lea Thompson, and Christopher Lloyd.

programme.title: Christmas with a Kiss
programme.desc: A woman returns home to help with her family's Christmas Carnival and romance ignites. A photo journalist curates a surprise reunion. Starring Mishael Morgan, Ronnie Rowe Jr. and Jaime M Callica.

programme.title: My Norwegian Holiday
programme.desc: Dealing with her grandma's death, JJ seeks dissertation inspiration. Henrik, drawn to her troll figurine, invites her to Bergen, Norway, to trace its origins. Starring Rhiannon Fish and David Elsendoorn.

programme.title: Christmas with the Singhs
programme.desc: Newly engaged Asha Singh and Jake O'Brien are excited to spend Christmas together, but their relationship is tested when their families' cultural and holiday traditions clash. Stars Anuja Joshi, Benjamin Hollingsworth.

programme.title: Write Before Christmas
programme.desc: Jessica sends Christmas cards to those special to her- the aunt who raised her, her brother, an aging popstar, the teacher that inspired her, and her friend that always tells the truth. Stars Torrey DeVitto, Chad Michael Murray.

programme.title: An Alpine Holiday
programme.desc: Two vastly different sisters follow their late grandparent's steps and experience everything the Alps has to offer- including romance. Starring Ashley Williams, Laci J. Mailey, and Julien Samani.

programme.title: Jingle Bell Run
programme.desc: Self-described bookworm Avery is paired with retired hockey star Wes to compete in a holiday race across America. The team struggles through themed challenges until romance runs its course. Stars Ashley Williams, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: The Christmas Baby
programme.desc: A couple is surprised when a baby is mysteriously dropped off on their doorstep, forcing them to navigate a new terrain in their relationship and careers. Stars Ali Liebert , Katherine Barrell, and Barbara Niven.

programme.title: A Keller Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: Siblings Dylan, Cal, and Emory are at a crossroads in their lives and have drifted apart. To help, their parents plan a family Christmas river cruise visiting Germany and Austria. Stars Jonathan Bennett, Brandon Routh, Eden Sher.

programme.title: The Search for Mr. Christmas
programme.desc: Host Jonathan Bennett and judge Melissa Peterman kick off the hunt for Hallmark's next leading man as ten new hunks reinvent Santa, then brave a ski-slope meet-cute with Janel Parrish- where spills steal the scene.

programme.title: Unwrapping Christmas: Tina's Miracle
programme.desc: Successful gift-wrapping shop owner Tina is in charge of planning this year's annual Christmas gala. But things begin to go awry when the gala faces cancellation due to a scrooge-like estate owner. Stars Natalie Hall, Alec Santos.

programme.title: A Very Merry Bridesmaid
programme.desc: Leah's 30th birthday is on Christmas Eve, the same day as her brother's wedding. Her childhood crush is back in town for the wedding and he is determined to make sure her birthday is celebrated. Stars Emily Osment, Casey Deidrick.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: A Deadly Recipe
programme.desc: Bakery owner Hannah Swensen just can't keep her hands out of the batter when murder stirs things up in Lake Eden, Minnesota, leaving the sheriff dead, a deputy accused, and a killer on the loose. Stars Alison Sweeney.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Just Desserts
programme.desc: Hannah is thrilled when she is chosen as a guest for the first Eden Lake Dessert Bake-Off, but when a fellow judge is found murdered, Hannah takes it upon herself to find the killer. Stars Alison Sweeney, Cameron Mathison.

programme.title: Poison in a Pear Tree - Part 1
programme.desc: Christmas shop owner Emily Lane uses secret skills to investigate a murder when a poisoned cookie links her to the crime. Detective Sam Wilner navigates the holidays with daughter Violet. Stars Sarah Drew and Peter Mooney.

programme.title: Poison in a Pear Tree - Part 2
programme.desc: With time running out to prove her friend's innocence, Emily puts her own secret past on the line to find the real tree farm killer, raising suspicion from Detective Sam Wilner. Stars Sarah Drew and Peter Mooney.

programme.title: Family History Mysteries: Buried Past
programme.desc: Genealogist Sophie McClaren is an expert at bringing families together. When her close friend JONATHAN urgently needs to find a bone marrow donor, the case becomes personal. Stars Janel Parrish and Niall Matter.

programme.title: The Dancing Detective: A Deadly Tango
programme.desc: A no-nonsense detective must reluctantly team up with a charismatic British dance star in order to solve a murder. Stars Lacey Chabert, Will Kemp.

programme.title: True Justice: Family Ties
programme.desc: A law school student and her friends, set out to prove her brother's innocence but the only way to clear his name is by finding the real killer. Stars Katherine McNamara, Markian Tarasiuk, Nikki DeLoach, Benjamin Ayres.

programme.title: Curious Caterer: Dying for Chocolate
programme.desc: Colorado caterer Goldy Berry teams with detective Tom Schultz to identify the ingredients that led to the mysterious death of her friend — and ends up discovering a hidden recipe for murder. Stars Nikki Deloach and Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Curious Caterer: Grilling Season
programme.desc: Caterer Goldy Berry reunites with detective Tom Schultz when a realtor is murdered. As they uncover personal and professional rivalries, they realize the culprit is closer than expected. Stars Nikki DeLoach, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Curious Caterer: Fatal Vows
programme.desc: When Goldy agreed to cater Tom's ex Jessamyn's elaborate wedding, she didn't expect a dead groom and missing bridezilla would bring her together with Tom again, to catch a killer and find Jess. Stars Nikki DeLoach & Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Curious Caterer: Foiled Plans
programme.desc: Goldy Berry's Medieval feast at Hyde Castle gets interrupted by a murder. She teams up with Detective Shultz to solve the mystery before the murderer strikes again. Nikki DeLoach, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Curious Caterer: Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Goldy Berry caters a VIP concert and goes on a date with Tom. Starring Nikki DeLoach and Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Gilded Newport Mysteries: Murder at the Breakers
programme.desc: A society page writer in 1895 Rhode Island witnesses a murder while attending a ball at the Vanderbilt mansion and is drawn into the investigation when her brother is arrested. Stars Ali Skovbye, Danny Griffin, Nathan Witte.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: Something New
programme.desc: Young Aurora Teagarden returns home to Lawrenceton after college to pursue her post-grad degree and finds herself embroiled in a mystery involving her friend Sally's fiancé. Stars Skyler Samuels, Evan Roderick, Marilu Henner.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: A Lesson in Murder
programme.desc: When a student from Aurora's true crime literature class is found murdered outside the diner where she works, Aurora takes it upon herself to figure out the real culprit. Stars Skyler Samuels, Evan Roderick, and Marilu Henner.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: Death at the Diner
programme.desc: When the owner of the diner where Aurora Teagarden works is suddenly killed, her new boyfriend becomes the primary suspect! Stars Skyler Samuels, Evan Roderick and Marilu Henner.

programme.title: CrimeTime: Freefall
programme.desc: Crime series actress Hadley Warner retires to a small town where she encounters her first real case. Using her TV crime knowledge, she teams up with Detective Caden to solve the case. Starring Lyndie Greenwood, Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: Mystery 101: Pilot
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, English professor Amy uses her crime fiction expertise to unravel the case faster than detective Travis, who ends up working with Amy to catch the killer. Stars Jill Wagner, Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: Mystery 101: Playing Dead
programme.desc: The local theater is producing a mystery that crime fiction expert Amy unearthed. When one of the actress' life is threatened, Amy & Travis must uncover which character is playing for keeps. Stars Jill Wagner, Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: Mystery 101: Words Can Kill
programme.desc: When a guest at the college book festival is killed, Amy and Travis clash after he arrests an unlikely person for murder. Amy must fight to prove he's got the wrong person behind bars. Starring Jill Wagner and Kristoffer Polaha.
